commands.name: environment
commands.description: Run commands related to working with development environments.

commands.name: rock
commands.description: Updates the Rock installation to match the configuration file.

commands.name: plugin
commands.description: Updates the plugins to match the configuration file.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Checks the status of the environment against the configured values.

commands.name: plugin
commands.description: Run commands related to working with plugins.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new plugin following a standard template.

commands.name: configure
commands.description: Changes the configured parameters of a plugin.

arguments.name: plugin
arguments.description: The plugin path relative to the environment.

commands.name: pack
commands.description: Packs a plugin into an installation archive.

arguments.name: version
arguments.description: The version of the archive to import.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Run commands related to code generation.

arguments.name: assembly
arguments.description: The assembly to read C# classes from.

commands.name: listblock
commands.description: Creates a list block from a C# data model.

commands.name: detailblock
commands.description: Creates a detail block from a C# data model.
